TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: D. J. Augustin unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u misimaw zikuzay mimaliay. D. J. Augustin i 2008 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 9, namapili' tu nu Charlotte Bobcats putiput. 11 bulad 10 demiad, 1987 a mihca, D. J. Augustin, miunduay.
S.PHON: d. *. augustin unu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, u misimaw zikuzaj mimar~ɾiaj. d. *. augustin i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ *, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu ʦħarr~ɾottə bobʦats putiput. ** bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, d. *. augustin, miunduaj.
S.FORM: D. J. Augustin unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u misimaw zikuzay mimaliay. D. J. Augustin i 2008 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 9, namapili' tu nu Charlotte Bobcats putiput. 11 bulad 10 demiad, 1987 a mihca, D. J. Augustin, miunduay.
S.PHON: d. *. augustin unu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, u misimaw zikuzaj mimar~ɾiaj. d. *. augustin i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ *, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu ʦħarr~ɾottə bobʦats putiput. ** bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, d. *. augustin, miunduaj.
